requirement_topic.en: BEA / BPC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BEA / BPC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: BEA / BPC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: The Bhutan Electricity Authority (BEA) is the statutory electricity sector regulator in Bhutan, established under the Bhutan Electricity Act 2001. Bhutan Power Corporation (BPC) is the state-owned grid operator responsible for transmission, distribution, and retail supply. All grid-connected BESS installations require BEA project licensing and BPC grid-connection approval before commissioning. Bhutan's grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, aligned with IEC standard voltages and shared with India's interconnected grid. CRITICAL: China's nominal low-voltage is 220/380 V — Bhutan's 230/400 V shares the 50 Hz frequency but the nominal voltage differs from China. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Bhutan's 230/400 V grid before grid-connection testing. Bhutan's grid is hydro-dominant (>99% hydro generation), which creates a distinctive grid profile: the system is prone to high voltage and frequency excursions during high-hydro seasons and may require specific BESS ride-through and reactive power capability settings negotiated with BPC. IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series — including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) — represents the internationally expected technical reference for BESS grid integration in IEC-aligned markets. BEA and BPC project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from the respective authorities. No publicly accessible BEA or BPC technical specification specifically for grid-connected BESS has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: 不丹电力监管局（BEA）是依据2001年《不丹电力法》设立的法定电力行业监管机构。不丹电力公司（BPC）是负责输电、配电和零售供电的国有电网运营商。所有并网BESS装置在调试前须取得BEA项目许可和BPC并网批准。不丹电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、频率50 Hz，与IEC标准电压对齐，并与印度互联电网共享。重要提示：中国名义低压为220/380 V——不丹的230/400 V与中国共享50 Hz频率，但名义电压不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的BESS储能变流器（PCS）须在并网测试前重新针对不丹230/400 V电网进行参数配置。不丹电网以水电为主（水电占比>99%），形成独特的电网特性：系统在丰水期易发生高电压和高频偏差，可能需要与BPC协商特定的BESS穿越能力和无功功率能力设置。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列——包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）——是与IEC对齐市场中BESS电网集成的国际预期技术参考。BEA和BPC项目专属并网协议条款须直接向相关主管机关获取。截至本数据集日期，未从官方来源确认BEA或BPC公开发布专门针对并网BESS的技术规格。
summary.zht: 不丹電力監管局（BEA）是依據2001年《不丹電力法》設立的法定電力行業監管機構。不丹電力公司（BPC）是負責輸電、配電和零售供電的國有電網運營商。所有併網BESS裝置在調試前須取得BEA項目許可和BPC併網批准。不丹電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、頻率50 Hz，與IEC標準電壓對齊，並與印度互聯電網共享。重要提示：中國名義低壓為220/380 V——不丹的230/400 V與中國共享50 Hz頻率，但名義電壓不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須在併網測試前重新針對不丹230/400 V電網進行參數配置。不丹電網以水電為主（水電佔比>99%），形成獨特的電網特性：系統在豐水期易發生高電壓和高頻偏差，可能需要與BPC協商特定的BESS穿越能力和無功功率能力設置。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列——包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）——是與IEC對齊市場中BESS電網集成的國際預期技術參考。BEA和BPC項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向相關主管機關獲取。截至本數據集日期，未從官方來源確認BEA或BPC公開發布專門針對併網BESS的技術規格。

standards_or_laws: Bhutan Electricity Act 2001 — statutory basis for BEA licensing and regulatory authority over all electricity installations including grid-connected BESS

IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference in IEC-aligned Bhutan framework)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Bhutan grid standard voltage: 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz (IEC-aligned; interconnected with India's grid)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Bhutan's 230/400 V. PCS firmware and protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Bhutan's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning in Bhutan.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与不丹230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在不丹并网测试和调试前重新针对不丹230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與不丹230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在不丹併網測試和調試前重新針對不丹230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy BEA licensing or BPC grid-connection requirements in Bhutan. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Bhutan is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; although both operate at 50 Hz, the nominal voltage differs and PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested — do not assume China voltage compliance transfers to Bhutan; (b) hydro-grid profile — Bhutan's near-100% hydro grid with India interconnection creates voltage and frequency operating envelopes that may differ materially from Chinese grid parameters; BESS PCS ride-through and reactive power settings must be validated against BPC's specific grid conditions; (c) BEA project licensing — obtain BEA licence before procurement or installation commences; (d) BPC connection agreement — engage BPC at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (e) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications or BPC require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (f) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA / communication interface protocol required by BPC for BESS monitoring.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足不丹BEA许可或BPC并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——不丹为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；尽管均为50 Hz，但名义电压不同，PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并重新测试——不能假设中国电压合规可转用于不丹；（b）水电电网特性——不丹近100%水电电网及与印度的互联，形成可能与中国电网参数存在实质差异的电压和频率运行区间；BESS PCS穿越能力和无功功率设置须针对BPC特定电网条件进行验证；（c）BEA项目许可——在采购或安装开始前取得BEA许可；（d）BPC并网协议——在设备设计最终确定前，于项目最早阶段与BPC接触以获取技术要求；（e）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格或BPC要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（f）通信协议——确认BPC对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足不丹BEA許可或BPC併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——不丹為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；儘管均為50 Hz，但名義電壓不同，PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並重新測試——不能假設中國電壓合規可轉用於不丹；（b）水電電網特性——不丹近100%水電電網及與印度的互聯，形成可能與中國電網參數存在實質差異的電壓和頻率運行區間；BESS PCS穿越能力和無功功率設置須針對BPC特定電網條件進行驗證；（c）BEA項目許可——在採購或安裝開始前取得BEA許可；（d）BPC併網協議——在設備設計最終確定前，於項目最早階段與BPC接觸以獲取技術要求；（e）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格或BPC要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（f）通訊協議——確認BPC對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BEA project licensing is required for all electricity installations in Bhutan under the Bhutan Electricity Act 2001; BPC grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the BPC connection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Bhutan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy BEA licensing or BPC grid-connection requirements in Bhutan. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Bhutan's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid — the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V despite the shared 50 Hz frequency. Bhutan's near-100% hydro grid interconnected with India creates a distinctive operating envelope; BESS ride-through and reactive power settings must be validated specifically for BPC grid conditions. Obtain BEA project licensing before procurement commences and engage BPC at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements and applicable IEC 62933 evidence. No publicly accessible BEA or BPC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct authority engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足不丹BEA许可或BPC并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对不丹230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置——尽管共享50 Hz频率，名义电压与中国220/380 V不同。不丹近100%水电电网与印度互联，形成独特的运行区间；BESS穿越能力和无功功率设置须专门针对BPC电网条件进行验证。在采购开始前取得BEA项目许可，并在项目最早阶段与BPC接触，确定并网协议技术要求及适用的IEC 62933证据。截至本数据集日期，未确认BEA或BPC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与相关主管机关接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足不丹BEA許可或BPC併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對不丹230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置——儘管共享50 Hz頻率，名義電壓與中國220/380 V不同。不丹近100%水電電網與印度互聯，形成獨特的運行區間；BESS穿越能力和無功功率設置須專門針對BPC電網條件進行驗證。在採購開始前取得BEA項目許可，並在項目最早階段與BPC接觸，確定併網協議技術要求及適用的IEC 62933證據。截至本數據集日期，未確認BEA或BPC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與相關主管機關接觸至關重要。
